articles.title: Fashion’s Favorite Climbing-Inspired Sneaker Has an American-Built Update
articles.summary: The KEEN Jasper KM Lite has arrived with an American build that's both responsibly made and lightweight by design. First introduced in 2008 as the brand’s climbing-inspired outdoor sneaker, the Jasper now has a refreshed look that delivers sleek style without compromising on comfort or quality. Most noticeably, the uppers have been smoothed with discreet stitching while the heel counter is satisfyingly streamlined into the midsole. It’s a subtle shift, but one that quietly ushers the Jasper from trail staple to a pair that’s just as at home in the city as it is off-grid.For men, the Jasper KM comes in three versatile colorways: Canteen/Black; Khaki/Birch; Black/Steel Grey, while for women, colorways include Granite Green/Black; Cameo Rose/Black; Plaza Taupe/Bitch; Brindle/Birch. The upper is constructed entirely from full-grain leather, stripping away the purely athletic components of its predecessors in favor of a clean, elegant finish. articles.title: TUNE’s Nike Air Force 1 CVS “Wardrobe Unlocked” Is Designed to Degrade
articles.summary: Name: TUNE x Nike Air Force 1 CVS “Wardrobe Unlocked”Colorway: Twilight MarshSKU: IR5895-399MSRP: TBCRelease Date: May 1Where to Buy: TUNE, TUNE SeongsuSeoul boutique TUNE and Nike are teaming up to release the TUNE x Nike Air Force 1 CVS "Wardrobe Unlocked," a heavily modified take on the 1990s silhouette that prioritizes material evolution.The collaboration entirely removes traditional leather from the upper, opting instead for a full canvas construction. Dressed in a monochromatic "Twilight Marsh" deep olive hue, the tonal approach gives the shoe a distinctly utilitarian, military-inspired structural finish. The Memphis Grizzlies superstar recently took to Instagram and X (formerly Twitter) to officially unveil his fourth signature basketball shoe, the Nike Ja 4.
